description: Style Note Accesorise your outfit with fabulous bangles from adrika. It will grab attention with its subtle beauty and exquisite designs. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece! Product Details Gold coloured metallic bangle that has an interlooped design with an opening that can be stretched to slide the hand through Material and Care Metallic bracelet Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Diameter: 4 cm
